index.title: Welcome to My Portfolio
index.description: Working with technology and studing Software solutions since 2020.

education.text: Graduated from the best federal institutions in Brazil, actively working on technological innovation and extension projects under the guidance of highly qualified professionals. Has a technical degree in systems development from IFRS and is studying computer engineering at UFRGS together with INF (Institute of Informatics)

experience.sumary: Experience in software development, with a focus on web and mobile applications, using technologies such as React, React Native, Node.js, and Python.
experience.text: Worked as a software developer at a technology company, where I was responsible for developing and maintaining web and mobile applications. I also participated in the design and implementation of new features, as well as in the optimization of existing ones.

revisaoonline.title: Revisão Online
revisaoonline.description: RevisãoOnline is one of the leading free ENEM essay correction sites. The platform follows the MVC model, built with PHP (backend), MySQL (database), and a frontend stack of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

arcrit.title: Arcrit
arcrit.description: Arcrit is a gamified platform for urban architectural discovery and evaluation. The tech stack features a React/Next.js frontend and a Firebase backend for real-time data and authentication.

mdi.title: MDI: My Data Importer
mdi.description: MDI is a platform integrated with Moodle that enables users to analyze large volumes of data through various tools. The application was developed using React, PostgreSQL, and Python for AI services.

curadorvirtual.title: Curador Virtual
curadorvirtual.description: Curador Virtual is a web application that allows users to review and rate products and services. The application was developed using React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a passionate software developer with a strong background in computer engineering. I have experience in developing web and mobile applications, and I am always eager to learn new technologies and improve my skills. I am committed to delivering high-quality solutions and contributing to innovative projects.
